about.story_text: Since 1999, Schlushed has delivered premium auto and truck detailing services in the Dolylestown area. Our expert team employs only the best space-age products to restore and protect your vehicle?s shine and finish.
about.founder_note: At Schlushed, we believe every vehicle deserves expert care using the latest technology and quality products. Trust us to keep your ride looking impeccable.
